overview: Global Trek is a world-class Himalayan trekking platform with 15 treks, booking system, live availability, trekker reviews, and admin tools.
features: Browse 15+ expert-guided treks in Uttarakhand and Himachal Pradesh
5-step online booking with real-time seat availability
Submit and browse trekker reviews with multi-dimension ratings
Live trek availability dashboard showing all batches at a glance
Admin panel for photo and review approvals, waitlist management, and booking overview
